creator: kob6558@gmail.com
text:
net-p2p/vuze was marked BROKEN because hte distribution file failed
to download after it was moved to a different directory on SF.

Fix: Update port Makefile to remove BROKEN and change MASTER_SITES to new location of
distribution file.
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/net-p2p/vuze ; make fetch
